AnimationMaxFrameRateSuggestion.en: (Best to restart the game when changing it/entering a level)
AnimationMaxFrameRateSuggestion.zh: (建议在进入关卡后调整时，重新启动游戏)
AnimationMaxFrameRateSuggestion.es: (Es mejor reiniciar el juego si lo cambias tras entrar en un nivel)

WebAudio.zh:
WEB
(加载更快，但音频可能卡顿)
WebAudio.es:
WEB
(reproduce al instante, pero puede trabarse)

EnterBilibili.en: Enter Bilibili UID(DO NOT ENTER RANDOMLY)
EnterBilibili.zh: 输入哔哩哔哩UID（建议复制粘贴再确认）
EnterBilibili.es: Introduce el UID de Bilibili (no lo escribas al azar)

WhiteListRequire.zh: 请跟作者沟通获取中文翻译白名单，或游玩木乃伊记忆无尽模式 3 小时

LoadingTips.en:
While Peashooters cost more sun, you better place your Sunflowers in the back. 
Protect those that cannot protect themselves!
LoadingTips.zh:
虽然豌豆射手需要更多阳光，但你最好把向日葵放在后方。
保护那些无法保护自己的生命！

LoadingTips.en: Puff-Shrooms can survive for an indefinite amount of time.
LoadingTips.zh: 噗噗菇可以无限期地存活。

LoadingTips.en:
DON'T play Kongfu Temple after Lost City. 
And don't tell me that I didn't warn you.
LoadingTips.zh:
玩完“失落之城”之后，千万别玩“功夫神殿”。
别跟我说我没警告过你。

LoadingTips.en: Primal peas and Scaredy-Shroom spores knockback zombies into the air so Blover works with them.
LoadingTips.zh: 原始豌豆和胆小菇孢子能将僵尸击飞到空中，所以三叶草与它们配合使用。

LoadingTips.en: Chip-lings can be planted in water.
LoadingTips.zh: 薯片种子可以水培。

LoadingTips.en: Better play worlds (except Kongfu Temple) in order.
LoadingTips.zh: 最好按顺序游玩各个世界（功夫寺除外）。

LoadingTips.en: Press the key '<KEYCODE_ALL_COLLECT>' to collect all sun and coins on the lawn.
LoadingTips.zh: 按下键盘 <KEYCODE_ALL_COLLECT> 键拾取所有的阳光和硬币。

LoadingTips.en: Gardendless is a fan-game, not a mod.
LoadingTips.zh: 请注意，Gardendless是一款粉丝自制游戏，并非MOD。

LoadingTips.en:
Perfume-Shrooms melt Zomboni ice. 
That perfume might be hotter than you think.
LoadingTips.zh:
香水蘑菇能融化僵尸冰车的冰块。
那款香水可能比你想象的更火辣。

LoadingTips.en:
Try Squash with Hurrikale. 
 Or just use Jalapeno.
LoadingTips.zh:
试试用南瓜配飓风甘蓝。
或者直接用墨西哥辣椒。

LoadingTips.en: Sea-peas extinguish torches, bombs, and other firey utilities.
LoadingTips.zh: 海豌豆可以扑灭火炬、炸弹和其他易燃物品。

LoadingTips.en: This mod adds more adventure plants to each world.
LoadingTips.zh: 这个模组为每个世界添加了更多冒险植物。

LoadingTips.en: Every coin has two sides.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Scaredy-shroom feels safe when protected by Pumpkins.
LoadingTips.zh: 胆小鬼在南瓜的保护下感到安全。

LoadingTips.en:
Heavenly Peaches give plants short durations of invincibility. 
Does not go well with Lychee and Garlic.
LoadingTips.zh: 天堂桃能使植物在短时间内保持无敌状态。不宜与荔枝和大蒜搭配食用。

LoadingTips.en: Aloes aren't always better than Heavenly Peaches.
LoadingTips.zh: 芦荟并不总是比天堂桃更好。

LoadingTips.en: Tall-Nuts act like heavy-duty Resistant Radishes.
LoadingTips.zh: 高果的作用类似于耐旱的萝卜。

LoadingTips.en: Jalapenos have the shortest recharge of all heavy-damage explosives.
LoadingTips.zh: 在所有高威力炸药中，墨西哥辣椒的冷却时间最短。

LoadingTips.en: Grave Busters can eat arcade cabinets, tents, backpacks, surfboards, weapon stands, and surprisingly, graves too.
LoadingTips.zh: 掘墓者可以吞噬街机、帐篷、背包、冲浪板、武器架，令人惊讶的是，它还可以吞噬坟墓。

LoadingTips.en: Octopi don't like playing hot potato.
LoadingTips.zh: 哈哈这里没有翻译。

LoadingTips.en: Try tiering up some of your plants to match your playstyle!
LoadingTips.zh: 哈哈这里没有翻译。

LoadingTips.en: Buy tiers in the upgrades section of the shop!
LoadingTips.zh: 哈哈这里没有翻译。

LoadingTips.en:
Torchwood can turn flaming peas into plasma peas, so better place 2 columns. 
Plantfooded Torchwoods turn snow peas into firey ones.
LoadingTips.zh:
火炬木可以将火焰豌豆变成等离子豌豆，所以最好放置两列。
喂食植物食物的火炬木可以将雪豌豆变成火焰豌豆。

LoadingTips.en: Try to stall with Potato Mines or other early-game plants to harvest extra sun.
LoadingTips.zh: 尝试用土豆地雷或其他早期游戏植物来拖延时间，以获取额外的阳光。

LoadingTips.en: You can use Shrinking Violet's speed reducing to your advantage by shrinking zombies and illuminating them with Solar Sage right after.
LoadingTips.zh: 你可以利用缩小紫罗兰的减速效果，将僵尸缩小，然后立即用太阳圣贤照亮它们。

LoadingTips.en: Fire Peashooter have chances to shoot plasma peas.
LoadingTips.zh: 火焰豌豆射手有几率发射等离子豌豆。

LoadingTips.en:
Pepper-pults heat plants. 
So do Red Marigolds.
LoadingTips.zh:
辣椒喷射器会加热植物。
红万寿菊也是如此。

LoadingTips.en: Murkadamia Nuts have more toughness on their jelly when first powered; they get 50% more at first.
LoadingTips.zh: 澳洲坚果坚果刚磨成粉末时，果冻的韧性更强；刚开始磨成粉末时，韧性会增加 50%。

LoadingTips.en: Unlock power mints with plant medals in the Zen Garden!
LoadingTips.zh: 在禅意花园中使用植物勋章解锁能量薄荷糖！

LoadingTips.en: Noctarines, Gold Blooms and Cran Jellies can be placed on top of plants without needing the shovel.
LoadingTips.zh: 夜来香、金花和蔓越莓果冻可以直接放在植物顶部，无需使用铲子。

LoadingTips.en: Ground plants can't be stolen by parrots.
LoadingTips.zh: 埋在地下的植物鹦鹉是偷不到的。

LoadingTips.en:
E.M. Peach disables more than you think. 
Try it on motor surfboards and Zombie Bulls.
LoadingTips.zh: 哈哈这里没有翻译。

LoadingTips.en: Try some of the reworked levels!
LoadingTips.zh: 试试一些重新设计的关卡吧！

LoadingTips.en: This mod adds Tumbleweed in the form of Bowling Primal Wall-Nut.
LoadingTips.zh: 写这篇文章非常费力。

LoadingTips.en: Check for polls in the mod forum for future balancing changes!
LoadingTips.zh: 你看过MOD论坛吗？

LoadingTips.en: Chip-ling originates from mR.
LoadingTips.zh: 也玩玩其他的MOD 游戏吧！

LoadingTips.en:
南Garden is such a peak developer. 
So are the others.
LoadingTips.zh: 南Garden 真是个顶尖的开发者。其他开发者也一样。

LoadingTips.en: Try Cycloquat with Banana Launcher or Pod Pilots!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Do not try Blover or Hurrikale in Aerial Fortress!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Use your Shovel Boost to get a quick refund from plants that are about to be consumed!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Who cares about playing "mowerless", "PFless", or on 4 peppers? 
Play how you like, enjoying the game comes first!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Imagine this mod as one that combines some of RFL's best changes with interesting reworks built off of vanilla!.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Both of Shadow Pea's forms provide pros and cons. 
Unpowered ones poison and powered ones pierce.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: You can tier up plants by buying them in the shop and changing their level using the "level" button in the almanac.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Lantern Cherry is one of the best budget heaters out there!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Make sure to get the base plant that you're looking to tier up. 
They don't show up in the shop until you actually have the base!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Not every level can be checked when a balancing change is made. 
If a change happens to hinder your progress, make sure to report!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Fire Gourd and chilling plants make a great team; 
Chill from afar and deal great damage if critical!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: You can use Infi-nut's PF effect to block octopi and fishermen's hooks, however the latter will inflict damage!.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Try using cheap plants like Puff-shroom to block All-stars, and Sea-shroom or Lily Pad to block fishermen.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: The game is actively being developed, be patient for new contents to come!
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Press the key '<KEYCODE_BANANA>' to activate a Banana Launcher or Missile Toe.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Knockback causes Barrel Rollers to stop rolling their barrels
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Wasabi Whip is great for heating and dishing out high, crowd-control damage. 
Bonk Choy is a good budget pick for the early game.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en: Lobbers may handle the "Imp" part of Battleplane Imp, but get your Moonbeans and Cycloquats for the "Battleplane" part.
LoadingTips.zh: 每枚硬币都有两面。

LoadingTips.en:
Collect each medal for each plant in a family,
then you can unlock their respective mint!
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en:
Struggling to counter a zombie? 
Check the zombie almanac (written by Sentry)!
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en:
Check out the repolished and comprehensive plant almanac for stats like 
splash damage, production rates, fire intervals, PF stats, etc.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Try pairing Plantern's PF and Sweet Potato for the ultimate lane diverter.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Don't frown upon Pea-nut, it has the same damage as Repeater, for a fraction of the cost!
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Apple Mortar my belove- I mean Apple Mortar is great for stunning groups of zombies.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Escape Root's roots are thin enough to slide through Pirate Seas' planks.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Spinapple can deflect nearly every hostile projectile, even Jester's reflected peas!
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Intensive Carrot provides 50% more HP to plants it has used sorcery on.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en:
Want to use Tangle Kelp and Seashooter on land? 
Try Waturnip.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en:
You can see where certain premium plants are unlocked by seeing their icon above levels. 
If a level has an icon above it, but isn't a boss fight, it means the level will give you the plant upon completion!
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Doom-shroom's crater lasts for a hefty 3 minutes.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Gumnut can be used to prevent Breakdancers from moving zombies and Gargantuars from throwing their imps.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Coconut Cannon deals light knockback.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Peashooter has lain outclassed for ages, what could possibly save that?
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Twin Sunflowers are not always worse than Sun-shroom or Primal Sunflower.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en:
Quest Branches reward you with epic qust plants upon completion! 
Though playing them before having a sufficient line-up isn't always the best idea.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！

LoadingTips.en: Some expansions should be ignored until you have a stronger plant arsenal at your disposal.
LoadingTips.zh:
集齐一个家族植物的所有徽章，
你将为他们解锁该家族的薄荷！
